# dnamusic
A program to generate MIDI files from DNA sequences using the system described in King, R. D., &amp; Angus, C. G. (1996). PM—protein music. Bioinformatics, 12(3), 251-252.

# dependencies
g++
https://github.com/logan-a-richey/midi_writer_cpp

# compiling
From the project root folder, run `make`.

# running
`bin/dnamusic [sequence] [output filename]`

For example:
```
bin/dnamusic  H2BC11.mid
```
(Note the above should be all one line.)

This example will output:
```
MPEPAKSAPAPKKGSKKAVTKAQKKDGKKRKRSRKESYSIYVYKVLKQVHPDTGISSKAMGIMNSFVNDIFERIAGEASRLAHYNKRSTITSREIQTAVRLLLPGELAKHAVSEGTKAVTKYTSAK
Saved H2BC11.mid
```
